Name: FE_CONTROLLER_SETTING_PARAM
Description: Defines controller input sensitivity and UI cursor movement behavior for the front-end interface.

Fields.Name: Minimum Input Sensitivity Threshold
Fields.Description: Defines the lowest input sensitivity level required before input begins to register.

Fields.Name: Minimum Movement Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Sets the base multiplier applied to movement speed at minimum input levels.

Fields.Name: Cursor Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Defines the maximum speed at which the UI cursor can move.
